t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Auto-incrementing primary key. FK target for Wallet.ConversionStatuses and Wallet.ConversionTransactions.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Auto-incrementing primary key. FK target for Wallet.ConversionStatuses and Wallet.ConversionTransactions. Passthrough from WalletDB.
t1_fidelity_table.loss: Added attribution suffix; no semantic loss

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Links to the parent request in Wallet.Requests.CorrelationId.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Links to the parent request in Wallet.Requests.CorrelationId. Used by the orchestration saga to deduplicate retries.
t1_fidelity_table.loss: Added unverified orchestration saga claim; upstream text preserved

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Timestamp when the conversion was initiated.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Timestamp when the conversion was initiated. Passthrough from Wallet.Conversions.Occurred.
t1_fidelity_table.loss: Added source reference; no semantic loss

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: The source wallet from which crypto is sold. FK to Wallet.Wallets.WalletId.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: The source wallet from which crypto is sold. FK to Wallet.Wallets.WalletId.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Destination blockchain address for this conversion leg. NULL when the transfer is internal.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Destination blockchain address for this conversion leg. NULL when the transfer is internal. FROM-leg outgoing address.
t1_fidelity_table.loss: Added leg clarification; no semantic loss

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Amount of source crypto being sold. In native units of FromCryptoId.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Amount of source crypto being sold. In native units of FromCryptoId. This is the original requested amount before execution.
t1_fidelity_table.loss: Added execution context; no semantic loss

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Source cryptocurrency being sold. FK to Wallet.CryptoTypes.CryptoID.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Source cryptocurrency being sold. FK to Wallet.CryptoTypes.CryptoID.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Amount of crypto for this conversion leg in native units.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Amount of crypto for this conversion leg in native units. FROM-leg actual executed amount (may differ from RequestedFromAmount due to slippage/fees).
t1_fidelity_table.loss: Added FROM-leg context; no semantic loss

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: The destination wallet into which the purchased crypto arrives. FK to Wallet.Wallets.WalletId.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: The destination wallet into which the purchased crypto arrives. FK to Wallet.Wallets.WalletId.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Destination blockchain address for this conversion leg. NULL when the transfer is internal.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Destination blockchain address for this conversion leg. NULL when the transfer is internal. TO-leg receiving address.
t1_fidelity_table.loss: Added leg clarification; no semantic loss

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Amount of destination crypto being purchased. In native units of ToCryptoId.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Amount of destination crypto being purchased. In native units of ToCryptoId. This is the original requested amount before execution.
t1_fidelity_table.loss: Added execution context; no semantic loss

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Destination cryptocurrency being purchased. FK to Wallet.CryptoTypes.CryptoID.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Destination cryptocurrency being purchased. FK to Wallet.CryptoTypes.CryptoID.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Amount of crypto for this conversion leg in native units.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Amount of crypto for this conversion leg in native units. TO-leg actual executed amount received in the destination wallet.
t1_fidelity_table.loss: Added TO-leg context; no semantic loss

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Estimated blockchain network fee for this leg.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Estimated blockchain network fee for this leg. FROM-leg estimated blockchain fee in native crypto units. NULL when blockchain fee was not available at load time.
t1_fidelity_table.loss: Added FROM-leg context and NULL semantics; no semantic loss from upstream

issues.problem: Tagged Tier 2 (WalletDB.Wallet.ConversionTransactions) but is a passthrough from ConversionTransactions.EstimatedBlockChainFee with upstream wiki available in bundle. Symmetric column FromEtoroEstimatedBCFee (#23) is correctly tagged Tier 1. Inconsistent tier assignment.
Tagged Tier 2 but is a passthrough rename from ConversionTransactions.Occurred (TO leg). Upstream wiki documents Occurred as 'Timestamp of this transaction record creation.' Should be Tier 1.
Tagged Tier 2 but is a passthrough rename from ConversionTransactions.Occurred (FROM leg). Same upstream source as ToEtoroDate. Should be Tier 1.

Upstream Wallet.Conversions documents ConversionTypeId (1=FixedFrom, 2=FixedTo) as a key business column. This column was not loaded into the DWH table, but the wiki does not mention its absence or the loss of pricing-direction metadata.
Wiki adds 'Used by the orchestration saga to deduplicate retries' which does not appear in the upstream Wallet.Conversions wiki. Unsourced claim appended to an otherwise faithful Tier 1 description.

verdict.regeneration_feedback: Re-run with: (1) Re-tag ToEtoroEstimatedBCFee (#13) as Tier 1 — WalletDB.Wallet.ConversionTransactions, using verbatim upstream text 'Estimated blockchain network fee for this leg.' then append TO-leg qualifier and NULL observation. (2) Re-tag ToEtoroDate (#14) as Tier 1 — WalletDB.Wallet.ConversionTransactions, using upstream text 'Timestamp of this transaction record creation.' (3) Re-tag FromEtoroDate (#24) as Tier 1 — WalletDB.Wallet.ConversionTransactions, same upstream text. (4) Update footer tier counts from '14 T1, 31 T2' to '17 T1, 28 T2'. (5) Remove or explicitly attribute the 'orchestration saga' claim in CorrelationID.
